name: 5E Advanced Materials, Inc.
description: 5E Advanced Materials, Inc. is an exploration-stage company focused on becoming a vertically integrated producer of boron specialty materials and lithium. The company's flagship asset is the 5E Boron Properties located in Southern California, which is designated as Critical Infrastructure by the U.S. government. 5E Advanced Materials aims to deliver boron and lithium products that are essential for decarbonization, clean energy, and national security applications.
